The 1,000-year-old secret you‚Äôve been driving right past‚Ä¶ ‚ÄčEveryone wakes up at 4 AM to catch the sunrise at Nandi Hills, but 90% of people completely miss the ancient masterpiece sitting right at the bottom. ‚ÄčBuilt originally in the 9th century, the Sri Bhoga Nandishwara Gudi isn't just an architectural marvel‚ÄĒit‚Äôs a living energy center. If you look closely at the pillars, you can see the distinct craftsmanship of five different empires (including the Cholas and Hoysalas). ‚Äč ‚Äč Distance: ~60km from Bangalore (perfect for a morning ride). ‚Źį Best time to visit: Arrive by 7:30 AM before the crowd hits and the sun gets too harsh. ‚Äč ‚Äč#BhogaNandishwara #BangaloreTravel #NandiHills #KarnatakaTourism #BangaloreDiaries HiddenGemsIndia IncredibleIndia ExploreKarnataka
